label: Transparent River Rapids motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Morphous River Rapids transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated whitewater rapids motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no UI, no text.
Subject: A compact sculptural burst of mountain river whitewater: curling white foam, blue-green current ribbons, icy turquoise eddies, granite-gray spray shadows, faceted river stones visible at the base, crisp energetic silhouette, polished natural texture without photorealistic translucency.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; diagonal fast-flowing S-curve from upper left to lower right; keep all spray, foam crests, water ribbons, and granite stones inside the frame without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light, high clarity, fast workflow energy, precise edges, fresh alpine water color.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject, no landscape horizon, no forest, no fish, no kayaks, no people, no labels, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no UI mockup.

label: Light design-system board
prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous River Rapids" / "River Rapids", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible fast workflow system. Use mountain river whitewater rapids: white foam, blue-green current, icy turquoise eddies, granite gray, deep river teal, mist white, pale glacial cyan, wet stone charcoal, and a small safety-signal amber accent. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data visualization, forms, table, command/search, status states, loading/error/empty states, texture samples, icon treatment, radius, spacing, borders, shadows, and semantic tokens. Use diagonal flow lanes, rapid current dividers, foam-cap active states, granite-framed panels, crisp dense operations UI, compact dashboards, queue/progress metaphors, and precise scan-friendly hierarchy. Exclude generic purple gradients, one-note blue-only palettes, ocean beach, waterfall, kayaks, people, fish, random brand logos, lorem ipsum blocks, unreadable microtext, and misspellings. Exact visible title: Morphous River Rapids.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous River Rapids" / "River Rapids", translated from the same mountain whitewater rapids motif and matching the light board language. Use luminous white foam, blue-green current, icy turquoise eddies, granite gray, deep river teal, mist white, pale glacial cyan, wet stone charcoal, and a small safety-signal amber accent. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data visualization, forms, table, command/search, status states, loading/error/empty states, texture samples, icon treatment, radius, spacing, borders, shadows, and semantic tokens. Use diagonal flow lanes, rapid current dividers, foam-cap active states, granite-framed panels, crisp dense operations UI, compact dashboards, queue/progress metaphors, bright focus rings, and precise scan-friendly hierarchy. Dark translation: deep river teal and wet stone charcoal surfaces, mist-white foreground, glacial cyan focus, foam-white highlights, granite borders, amber warnings. Exclude generic purple gradients, one-note blue-only palettes, ocean beach, waterfall, kayaks, people, fish, random brand logos, lorem ipsum blocks, unreadable microtext, and misspellings. Exact visible title: Morphous River Rapids.
